generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that in Finland, mandatory military service has been a cornerstone of their national security for decades? It's not just about defense—it's about community, responsibility, and ensuring every citizen is prepared. Countries like Finland show that conscription can work when it's fair and inclusive. Why shouldn't we consider similar measures to strengthen our own security and unity? #NationalService #SecurityFirst
